page: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sn2ne.3xlarge is a general-purpose virtual machine instance powered by the KVM hypervisor. It features 12 dedicated physical cores and 12 vCPUs utilizing the Intel Xeon E5-2682v4 processor running at 2.5 GHz on the x86_64 architecture. The hardware configuration includes 48.0 GB of system memory, providing a balanced 4.0 GB of RAM per core. This instance does not include local storage or GPU accelerators, relying on network-attached storage and a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps.

Benchmark data reveals a clear distinction between single-core and multi-core performance. Single-core metrics, such as stress-ng and Geekbench single-core scores, fall into the weak and poor categories, reflecting the older CPU architecture. However, multi-core performance scales to average levels, as demonstrated by the stress-ng multi-core and Geekbench multi-core benchmarks. Memory bandwidth remains average for both cached and uncached operations, though Passmark memory scores are weak. Cryptographic and vector processing capabilities are supported via AVX, AVX512F, and AES instruction sets.

From a cost-efficiency perspective, the ecs.sn2ne.3xlarge offers a stable, dedicated resource profile suitable for workloads that benefit from multi-threaded execution rather than high single-thread speed. Given the 1:4 vCPU-to-RAM ratio and average multi-core capabilities, this instance is suited for general-purpose applications, multi-threaded decompression tasks, Redis caching layers, and moderate database operations. It is less suitable for single-threaded processing, high-throughput web serving, or large-scale language model inference.
description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sn2ne.3xlarge is a general-purpose instance featuring 12 dedicated vCPUs and 12 physical cores powered by an Intel Xeon E5-2682v4 processor running at 2.5 GHz. Built on the x86_64 architecture, it is equipped with 48.0 GB of RAM, translating to 4.0 GB per core, and operates on the KVM hypervisor. The instance does not include local storage or GPU hardware, and it provides a baseline network bandwidth of 2 Gbps. Performance benchmarks indicate weak single-core execution but average multi-core scaling, supported by instruction sets like AVX and AVX512F. This resource profile is qualitatively cost-efficient for multi-threaded workloads that do not require high single-thread performance. It is best suited for general-purpose applications, Redis caching, and moderate database operations.
og_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sn2ne.3xlarge is a general-purpose instance with 12 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs, 48 GB RAM, and 2 Gbps network bandwidth, offering balanced multi-core performance for general workloads.
meta_description: Alibaba Cloud ecs.sn2ne.3xlarge features 12 dedicated Intel Xeon vCPUs and 48 GB RAM, delivering balanced multi-core performance for general-purpose workloads.
tagline: A dedicated multi-core virtual server offering a balanced memory-to-CPU ratio for general-purpose computing and multi-threaded workloads.
bullet_points: 12 dedicated Intel Xeon E5-2682v4 vCPUs and physical cores
48.0 GB of system memory (4.0 GB per core)
No bundled local storage or GPU accelerators
Average multi-core scaling alongside weak single-core performance
Suited for general-purpose applications, Redis, and moderate databases
